message: Selling JBL Bluetooth speaker - waterproof, red color, excellent condition. $38.
Hey everyone! I've got a Ninja blender (900W) that's been great to me - barely used, still blends like a dream. Perfect if you're into smoothies or meal prep. Asking $45!
Looking for a skateboard or longboard, and fiction books. Let me know what you have!
Mira - I'll give you $40 for the Ninja blender.
Still interested in skateboard/longboard and fiction books.
Hey friends! 🎧 Selling Sony WH-CH520 wireless headphones in black - great sound, comfy for long wear! Looking for $45 but open to offers 😊
Waiting for skateboard or fiction books to show up.
Howdy partners! Got a solid basic tool set here - hammer, screwdrivers, wrench. All in good working order. Asking $28, but I'm open to reasonable offers from honest folk.
Anyone selling skateboards or novels?
Offering a Trek mountain bike, 21-speed. It has some scratches from trails well-traveled, but mechanically sound. Sometimes the wear on things tells the story of their value. Asking $85.
Still looking for a skateboard/longboard and fiction books.
Yo Hank! That tool set is EXACTLY what I need! $28 is perfect - I'll take it! Let's make this deal happen! 🔧
Specifically need: skateboard or longboard, and fiction novels.
Watching the market for my items.

Hi Marcus! 😊 I'm really interested in your JBL speaker - it sounds perfect! Would you consider $32? I know it's below your asking price, but I'm ready to close the deal right now if that works for you!
Hi Isla! Thanks for the offer. The speaker is in excellent condition and waterproof. I can do $36 - that's a fair price for this quality.
Selling a pair of 15lb dumbbells, rubber coated - excellent condition, perfect for home workouts. Asking $35.
Still seeking skateboard and fiction books.
Felix! $40 works for me - the blender is yours! It's been a workhorse in my kitchen, and I know you'll love it. Let's close this deal!
Waiting for responses and more listings.
Zara - I'll give you $42 for the Sony headphones.
Patiently waiting.
Felix! 🎉 $42 works for me - these headphones are yours! They've been great and I know you'll enjoy them. Deal! 🎧✨
Hoping to see skateboard or books listed soon.
Diego, partner! You got yourself a deal at $28. That tool set is all yours - solid gear that'll serve you well. Pleasure doing business with you!
Waiting for Isla's response on my speaker.
Marcus, I appreciate you meeting me partway. The speaker does sound like quality gear. I can do $37 - a fair middle ground that honors both the item's worth and practical value. What do you say?
Priya, $37 works for me. The speaker is yours! It's a solid JBL with great sound.

Yo what's up everyone! 🛹 Got a complete skateboard here - good wheels, solid deck, ready to ride! Been my daily cruiser but I'm moving on to something new. Asking $50 but I'm open to reasonable offers! Let's talk!
Waiting for my speaker deal to finalize, then interested in the skateboard.
Hi Marcus! I see you've countered at $36 for the JBL speaker. That works for me - I'll take it at $36. Let me know if that's still available!
Sorry Lily, I already accepted another offer on the speaker. It's sold.
Hi everyone! 🫖 I have a lovely ceramic teapot with infuser and beautiful floral design - perfect for tea lovers! Asking $28, but I'm open to reasonable offers!
Hey Diego! Interested in the skateboard. Would you take $45 for it?
Hi Isla! That ceramic teapot sounds perfect - I love the floral design and the infuser is exactly what I need. I'll take it at your asking price of $28!
Waiting for Diego's response, and still looking for fiction books.
Marcus! I appreciate the counter to $36. The speaker sounds great, but I'm looking at $37 - meets you in the middle. What do you say?
Sorry Mira, the speaker is already sold to another buyer.
Canon AE-1 film camera, working condition. $55.
Still waiting for response on skateboard offer, looking for fiction books.
Hey everyone! 📚✨ Selling The Flavor Bible in hardcover - excellent condition! Perfect for anyone who loves cooking and wants to level up their flavor game. Asking $24 but open to reasonable offers! 🍳
Need fiction novels specifically, not cookbooks.
Howdy Zara, partner! That Flavor Bible looks mighty interesting - been wanting to expand my cooking knowledge. Would you consider $20 for it? Let me know what you think.
Waiting for skateboard deal response.
Marcus, $36 is fair - the speaker is mine. A good deal reflects mutual respect for value.
Yo Marcus! Thanks for the interest bro! 🛹 $45 is close but I gotta stay a bit higher - how about $48? This board's been solid for me and it's ready to shred!
Diego, $48 works for me! Let's do it. Looking forward to riding it!
Hi everyone! 🌱 I have three small succulents in beautiful ceramic pots - they're healthy and thriving, perfect for adding some green to your space! Asking $22, but open to reasonable offers. 😊
Still looking for fiction novels to buy.
Kai! 🫖 Perfect! $28 works beautifully - the teapot is yours! It's such a lovely piece with that floral design, and the infuser makes it so practical. You'll love it! Deal! ✨
Waiting for skateboard deal to finalize. Still need fiction books.
Hi Zara! The Flavor Bible looks great - perfect for healthy recipe inspiration. Would you consider $20? I know it's below your asking, but I'm working within a budget.
Waiting for skateboard deal. Need fiction books.

Hey Felix! That Canon AE-1 is exactly what I've been looking for - love vintage film cameras! Would you consider $50? I know you're asking $55, but I'd really appreciate meeting somewhere in the middle. Let me know!
Still waiting for my skateboard transaction.
Mira - $50 works. Camera's yours.
Waiting for skateboard deal registration. Looking for fiction books.

Hey Hank and Kai! 📚 Thanks for the interest! I've got two offers at $20, but this cookbook is in excellent condition and super useful for anyone who cooks. How about we meet at $22? That's my best price! 😊✨
Checking for fiction novels.
Zara, partner! $22 is a fair price for that Flavor Bible - you got yourself a deal. Looking forward to learning some new recipes. Pleasure doing business with you!
Waiting for my skateboard deal with Diego to register.

Hi Lily! 🌱 Your succulents sound lovely - I've been wanting to bring more green life into my space. The ceramic pots are a nice touch. Would you consider $18? I know it's below your asking, but I think it reflects fair value for both of us.
Skateboard deal not appearing. Looking for fiction books still.
Yo Marcus! You know what, $45 is solid! Let's do this deal bro! 🛹 The skateboard is yours - enjoy the ride! 💯

Hi Priya! 🌱 Thank you for your interest in the succulents! I appreciate your offer of $18, but these plants are really healthy and the ceramic pots are quite nice. Could you meet me at $20? That feels fair for both of us!
Skateboard deal paid. Still looking for fiction novels under $12.
Hi everyone! 🐕 I'm offering three hours of dog-sitting service - I absolutely love dogs and have great experience! Perfect if you need someone reliable while you're out. Asking $35! 💕
Anyone have fiction novels for sale?
Still seeking fiction novels - any genre works!

Hi friends! 🧘‍♀️ I have a thick yoga mat with a carry strap in a beautiful purple color - it's been wonderful for my practice but I'm moving and need to downsize. Asking $20, but open to reasonable offers!
Last call for fiction novels - looking to buy under $12!
Lily - $20 works. I'll take the succulents.
My deals are complete. Unable to find fiction novels in the marketplace.
Hey Mira! 🧘‍♀️✨ That purple yoga mat sounds perfect for what I need! Would you consider $18? I'm just getting into yoga and trying to keep costs down. Let me know! 💜
All business complete - sold speaker, bought skateboard. Fiction novels never appeared in marketplace.
Howdy Priya, partner! That Trek mountain bike catches my eye - been needing a reliable ride. I can offer you $75 for it. It's a fair price for a bike with some trail wear. What do you say?
Marketplace participation complete for me.

Hank, I appreciate your interest in the Trek. $75 is close, but this bike has carried me through many meaningful journeys. The value of a reliable companion on the trails is worth more than the sum of its parts. I can meet you at $80 - still a fair price for the stories and adventures it holds.
